item.title: //go:fix inline and the source-level inliner
item.description: How Go 1.26's source-level inliner works, and how it can help you with self-service API migrations.

item.title: Allocating on the Stack
item.description: A description of some of the recent changes to do allocations on the stack instead of the heap.

item.title: Using go fix to modernize Go code
item.description: Go 1.26 includes a new implementation of go fix that can help you use more modern features of Go.

item.title: Go 1.26 is released
item.description: Go 1.26 adds a new garbage collector, cgo overhead reduction, experimental simd/archsimd package, experimental runtime/secret package, and more.

item.title: Results from the 2025 Go Developer Survey
item.description: The 2025 Go Developer Survey results, focused on developer sentiment towards Go, use cases, challenges, and developer environments.

item.title: The Green Tea Garbage Collector
item.description: Go 1.25 includes a new experimental garbage collector, Green Tea.

item.title: Flight Recorder in Go 1.25
item.description: Go 1.25 introduces a new tool in the diagnostic toolbox, flight recording.

item.title: It's survey time! How has Go has been working out for you?
item.description: Help shape the future of Go

item.title: A new experimental Go API for JSON
item.description: Go 1.25 introduces experimental support for encoding/json/jsontext and encoding/json/v2 packages.
